description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style: Golden stainless steel oval caseDial style: Silver dial with golden handsStrap style: Golden bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp and crystal embellishmentsFeatures: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset timeWater resistantWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 15 mmCase thickness: 5 mm
